title: Dress as the wealthy version of you today
subtitle: A body-based practice for bringing the identity of financial abundance into how you present yourself.
excerpt: An embodiment practice from Day 22 of the MONEY program. Use on any morning when the wealthier version of you feels distant to put that identity on, literally.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education, drawing on the embodiment tradition in identity work: the idea that physical choices (posture, clothing, gesture) signal identity to the nervous system before cognitive statements do. Aligned with Day 22 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: An embodiment practice from Day 22 of the MONEY program. The premise is specific: the wealthier version of you makes different small physical choices every day. This practice asks you to make one of them today, so your body gets ahead of your thinking.

This morning, before you leave the house, ask one question: what would the version of me with money wear today? Not a costume. Not anything you don't own. Just a plain answer to that question applied to what's already in your wardrobe.
Stand in front of the mirror before you go. Hand on heart, say this once:
I am dressed as myself today.
The purpose isn't to perform wealth for anyone else. It's to give your body one concrete signal, from you to you, that today you're operating from the new identity.
Original to homemade.education, drawing on the role of physical choices in identity signalling. Aligned with Day 22 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
